messages.body: Did you consider tenacity instead of hand-rolling this?
I did — but the project keeps runtime dependencies at zero (stdlib + requests only), so I hand-rolled the ~15 lines. tenacity would be the right call otherwise.
random.uniform is unseeded — any chance of flaky timing in CI?
None reaches CI: the tests stub random.uniform and time.sleep via monkeypatch. In production the jitter must stay unseeded — that's what prevents synchronized retry storms.
